title: Cardholder Data Security
description: Cardholder data (such as PAN, card number) must be encrypted and protected.
fix: Disclose that cardholder data is encrypted and indicate that sensitive authentication data (e.g., CVV) is never stored.

title: Use of Weak Hashing/Protocols
description: Strong cryptography must be used to protect cardholder data during transmission. The use of weak algorithms (MD5, WEP) is forbidden.
fix: Discontinue use of weak algorithms like MD5 or WEP and upgrade to TLS 1.2 or higher.
